argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const query = "{{ query }}"; const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/aweme/v1/life/video_api/search/poi/?keyword=' + encodeURIComponent(query) + '&count=' + limit + '&aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); return (res.poi_list ?? []).map(p => ({ poi_id: p.poi_id, name: p.poi_name, address: p.address, city: p.city_name })); }
